name: New-hire onboarding checklist
description: Walk a new hire's onboarding through HR, IT, and the manager in sequence — each role confirms its checklist items, with daily reminders — and a notifying agent confirms completion at the end.

human.message: New hire {{ctx.employeeName}} starts on {{ctx.startDate}}. Please complete the HR onboarding items (contract, payroll, policies) and confirm.
HR onboarding for {{ctx.employeeName}} is done. Please provision accounts, hardware, and access, then confirm.
IT setup for {{ctx.employeeName}} is done. Please prepare the first-week plan and introductions, then confirm.

steps.prompt: Confirm that onboarding for {{ctx.employeeName}} is complete: HR, IT, and the manager have each finished their checklist. Summarize what was completed.

agents.label: Notifying agent
agents.description: Agent that confirms completed onboarding to the stakeholders.

roles.label: HR role
roles.description: Role that completes the HR checklist items.

roles.label: IT role
roles.description: Role that provisions accounts, hardware, and access.

roles.label: Manager role
roles.description: Role that prepares the new hire's first week.

channels.label: Delivery channel
channels.description: Channel used to reach the HR, IT, and manager roles.
